---
title: "Villie - a hypergraph-based visual programming language"
author:
  - name: Michal Kottman
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2010-09-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "ITAT'2010: Informačné technológie - Aplikácie a Teória"
  publisher: "PONT s.r.o."
  isbn: "978-80-970179-3-4"
  page: "69-74"
---
